title: Bitcoin price just tagged 200-week trend line that defined 2022 bear market

title: Buyout and Debt Funds Struggle With $632 Billion Stockpile

title: Oil Falls After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Even as Clashes Persist
summary: Oil fell as a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon offered to ease the way toward a US-Iran peace deal, even as the truce was marred by ongoing clashes.
